title: T-004 — scanner capability detection lib/scanner/detect.ts (06-a)
prompt:
# T-004 — scanner capability detection

PRD: 06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §6 D5, §8.1 FR-SC-FE-011, §11.1, §11.2
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Provide `detectScannerCapabilities()` returning `{ hardware, camera, manual: true, deviceType, preferredMode }` so every scanner page can choose the right input affordance.

## Implementation contract
1. Module `apps/scanner/src/lib/scanner/detect.ts`:
   - UserAgent regex: `/Zebra|Datalogic/i`, `/Honeywell/i`, `/iPhone|iPad/i`, `/Android/i`.
   - Hardware heuristic: input event timing analysis — wedge bursts < 50ms per char, terminator Enter — exposed as `classifyKeystrokeBurst(events: KeyboardEvent[])`.
   - Camera detection: `navigator.mediaDevices?.getUserMedia` capability probe, lazy (no permission prompt during detection).
   - `preferredMode` rule: hardware > camera > manual.
2. Type `ScannerCapabilities` exported.
3. Vitest with mocked navigator (use jsdom + custom userAgent fixtures); cover all 7 device buckets in §11.1.

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/lib/scanner/detect.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/lib/scanner/index.ts [modify]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/detect.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given navigator.userAgent matches /Zebra/, when detectScannerCapabilities runs, then deviceType='zebra' and preferredMode='hardware'
2. Given navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia is undefined, when detectScannerCapabilities runs, then camera=false and preferredMode never returns 'camera'
3. Given a 6-char keystroke burst all <50ms apart ending in Enter, when classifyKeystrokeBurst runs, then it returns 'wedge'

## Test strategy
- RED: write apps/scanner/__tests__/detect.test.ts covering all 7 §11.1 device buckets + camera-absent + camera-present before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test detect'

## Risk red lines
- Do not call getUserMedia at module load (no permission prompts during detection)
- Do not throw if navigator is undefined (SSR safety — return manual-only)
- Do not hardcode device list outside the regex constants

pipeline_inputs.description: Detect scanner hardware/camera/manual capabilities and preferred mode for SSR-safe scanner UI bootstrap.
pipeline_inputs.details: Create apps/scanner/src/lib/scanner/detect.ts exporting detectScannerCapabilities + classifyKeystrokeBurst + ScannerCapabilities type. Implement UserAgent regexes per §11.1, lazy mediaDevices probe (no permission prompt), keystroke timing analysis. SSR-safe (must not throw when navigator is undefined). Vitest fixtures cover all 7 §11.1 buckets + camera-absent + a 6-char wedge burst.
